center.name: Northern Andean páramo
center.summary: Northern Andean páramo是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Andean siskin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in subtropical and páramo zones of the northern Andes

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in subtropical and páramo zones of the northern Andes
